title: January Update from the Alaska SBDC State Director
summary: Happy New Year! title: Congratulations to the Winners of the TREND Phase 0 Grant Program!
summary: The TREND Phase 0 Program, designed to bolster early-stage Alaskan innovators and forward-thinking companies with promising technologies, has awarded grants of up to $10,000 to qualified recipients. These awards support recipients as they advance their research and gain a competitive edge within the...
